modules.name: Introduction to Microsoft Teams
modules.description: Introduction to Microsoft Teams as a collaboration platform, covering core features, real-world use cases, and hands-on experience creating and managing Teams and Channels.

lessons.title: What is Microsoft Teams?
topics: Challenges of group work and collaboration
Microsoft Teams overview — chat, video meetings, channels, file sharing
Integration with Microsoft 365 tools (Outlook, Word, Excel, OneDrive)
Demo: creating a Team, starting a chat, uploading documents, scheduling meetings

lessons.title: Creating and Managing Teams & Channels
topics: Creating a Team (private vs. public, naming, adding members)
Organizing Channels (standard vs. private, naming conventions, pinning)
Managing permissions and settings (owner vs. member roles, guest permissions, channel moderation)
Case study: improving a poorly managed project team

assessment.title: Teams & Channels Project
items: Quiz on channel types, roles, and collaboration benefits
Project submission: screenshots of organized Team with channels and correct permissions configuration
